particulars.description: All assets debenture creating fixed and floating charges over all present and future assets and undertakings of the company.

classification.description: Deed of charge over credit balances

particulars.description: The charge creates a fixed charge over all the deposit(s) referred to in the schedule to the form 395 (including all or any part of the money payable pursuant to such deposit(s) & the debts represented thereby) together with all interest from time to time accruing thereon. It also creates an assignment by the chargor for the purposes of & to give effect to the security over the right of the chargor to require repayment of such deposit(s) & interest thereon. Barclays bank PLC re 2 degrees limited business base rate tracker account account no 73472981.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
